name: create_subscription
description: Create a new subscription in Paddle for a customer. Subscriptions are typically created through Paddle Checkout (client-side), but this endpoint lets you create them server-side. You specify the items (prices) and the customer to bill. Paddle handles all recurring billing, tax calculation, and invoicing automatically.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The Paddle customer ID to create the subscription for.

parameters.name: address_id
parameters.description: The address ID for the customer, used for tax calculation.

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: Array of items to include in the subscription. Each item has a 'price_id' and 'quantity'.

parameters.name: billing_details
parameters.description: Billing details including payment method. Object with 'payment_interval' and optional 'enable_checkout'.

parameters.name: currency_code
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the subscription.

parameters.name: custom_data
parameters.description: Custom key-value pairs to store with the subscription.
